case_title: LEI, MICHAEL VS INDEPENDENT TELEVISION SERVICE, INC.

docket_entries.description: PLAINTIFF FILED SMALL CLAIMS SUBPOENA POS. THIS SUBPOENA WAS NOT ISSUED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LEI, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT INDEPENDENT TELEVISION SERVICE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-17-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT INDEPENDENT TELEVISION SERVICE, INC.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO INDEPENDENT TELEVISION SERVICE, INC. RETURNED TO COURT UNABLE TO FORWARD.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEI, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INDEPENDENT TELEVISION SERVICE, INC. $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,075.00, THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF'S SERVICES WERE NOT DIRECTLY AUTHORIZED AS REQUESTED BY DEFENDANT, BUT THAT DEFENDANT DID DERIVE SAME BENEFIT FROM PLAINTIFF'S SERVICES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
EXHIBITS IN CASE #819394 AND #819396 ARE JOINT EXHIBITS FOR BOTH THE PLAINTIFF,THE DEFENDANT AND THE WITNESS.
